# ## DeltaToCSVExport — Multi-Source with Dynamic Date Filter

# ============================================================
# Cell 1 — Configuration
# ============================================================

from datetime import datetime, date
from dateutil.relativedelta import relativedelta

# ── Storage Settings ──────────────────────────────────────────
storage_account = "navispowerbidatastorage2"
container       = "mundra-ct02"

base_path = f"abfss://{container}@{storage_account}.dfs.core.windows.net"

# ── Date Filter ───────────────────────────────────────────────
# Options: 3 or 6  (months lookback from today)
LOOKBACK_MONTHS = 6

# ── Delta Sources to Export ───────────────────────────────────
# Add as many sources as needed.
# "source"      → path under silver/  (e.g. "moves", "vessels", "bookings")
# "date_col"    → column used for date filtering (Year + Month, or a timestamp col)
# "filter_type" → "year_month"  : filters on separate Year & Month int columns
#                 "date"        : filters on a single date/timestamp column
DELTA_SOURCES = [
    {
        "source"      : "moves",
        "date_col"    : None,          # uses Year + month columns (year_month mode)
        "filter_type" : "year_month",
        "apply_filter" : False,
    },
    {
        "source"      : "ecevents",
        "date_col"    : None, # single date/timestamp column
        "filter_type" : "year_month",
        "apply_filter" : False,
    },
    # {
    #     "source"      : "deckings",
    #     "date_col"    : None,
    #     "filter_type" : "year_month",
    # },
    # ➕ Add more sources here ...
]

# ============================================================
# Cell 2 — Compute Dynamic Date Cutoff
# ============================================================

today          = date.today()
cutoff_date    = today - relativedelta(months=LOOKBACK_MONTHS)
run_date_str   = today.strftime("%Y%m%d")          # e.g. 20260528
cutoff_year    = cutoff_date.year
cutoff_month   = cutoff_date.month

print(f"▶ Run date      : {today}")
print(f"▶ Lookback      : {LOOKBACK_MONTHS} months")
print(f"▶ Cutoff        : {cutoff_date}  (year={cutoff_year}, month={cutoff_month})")
print(f"▶ Output tag    : {run_date_str}")

# ============================================================
# Cell 3 — Export Loop
# ============================================================

from notebookutils import mssparkutils
from pyspark.sql import functions as F

summary = []   # collect results for the final report

for cfg in DELTA_SOURCES:
    src         = cfg["source"]                           # e.g. "moves"
    filter_type = cfg["filter_type"]
    date_col    = cfg.get("date_col")

    delta_path   = f"{base_path}/silver/{src}"
    staging_path = f"{base_path}/export/{src}_staging/"
    output_file  = f"{container}_{src}_{run_date_str}.csv"
    final_path   = f"{base_path}/export/{src}_result/"
    dest         = f"{final_path}{output_file}"

    print(f"\n{'='*60}")
    print(f"  Processing : silver/{src}")
    print(f"  Output     : {output_file}")
    print(f"{'='*60}")

    try:
        # ── Read Delta ────────────────────────────────────────
        df = spark.read.format("delta").load(delta_path)

        # ── Apply Dynamic Date Filter ─────────────────────────
        apply_filter = cfg.get("apply_filter", True)  # Default to True if not specified
        if not apply_filter:
            # Skip filtering for this source
            df_filtered = df
            print(f"  ℹ️ Filtering disabled for {src} - exporting all data")
        elif filter_type == "year_month":
            # Expects integer columns: Year, month (same as original notebook)
            df_filtered = df.filter(
                (F.col("Year") > cutoff_year) |
                (
                    (F.col("Year") == cutoff_year) &
                    (F.col("month") >= cutoff_month)
                )
            )

        elif filter_type == "date":
            # Expects a single date / timestamp column
            df_filtered = df.filter(
                F.col(date_col) >= F.lit(cutoff_date.isoformat())
            )

        else:
            raise ValueError(f"Unknown filter_type '{filter_type}' for source '{src}'")

        record_count = df_filtered.count()
        print(f"  Records    : {record_count:,}")
        df_filtered.printSchema()

        # ── Write CSV to Staging ──────────────────────────────
        df_filtered.coalesce(1).write \
            .mode("overwrite") \
            .option("header", "true") \
            .csv(staging_path)

        # ── Rename Part File → Clean CSV Name ─────────────────
        files     = mssparkutils.fs.ls(staging_path)
        part_file = [
            f.path for f in files
            if f.name.startswith("part-") and f.name.endswith(".csv")
        ][0]

        mssparkutils.fs.cp(part_file, dest, recurse=False)
        mssparkutils.fs.rm(staging_path, recurse=True)

        print(f"  ✅ Saved to : {dest}")
        summary.append({"source": src, "records": record_count, "output": output_file, "status": "✅ Success"})

    except Exception as e:
        print(f"  ❌ FAILED   : {e}")
        summary.append({"source": src, "records": "—", "output": output_file, "status": f"❌ {e}"})
